bugs_fixed.fix_description: Added per-trade fallback with semaphore(10) concurrency cap. When empty-trade returns no records, discovers trades via TradeDiscoveryService, fetches records per trade in parallel, merges with _id dedup.
bugs_fixed.verification: 7298 → 60 drawings, 3 disciplines (CIVIL, PLUMBING, ARCHITECTURAL). Was: 0 drawings, 0 categories.

bugs_fixed.fix_description: Created AsyncS3Ops adapter wrapping sync s3_utils via run_in_executor. Wired into main.py replacing s3_ops=None. Uses asyncio.get_running_loop() for Python 3.12 compatibility.
bugs_fixed.verification: Full CRUD cycle: create (hl_c9c2f7e9f3) → list (count=1) → update (label/critical changed) → delete (deleted=true).

bugs_fixed.fix_description: Replaced empty stub in fetch_project_metadata() with real trade probing using _KNOWN_TRADES list from trade_discovery_service. Intent agent now receives actual trade list for keyword matching.
bugs_fixed.verification: intent.trade='Electrical' (was 'unknown'). Answer: 12,572 chars of real scope data with drawing references. Document generated.

bugs_fixed.fix_description: Fixed set_ids path: wrapped single int in list ([sid]) and unpacked tuple return (batch, _ = ...). Was passing int directly and iterating tuple.
bugs_fixed.verification: Code fix verified by code review agent. Matches pattern used in trade_discovery_service.py:176.

remaining_warnings.issue: Project name shows 'SQL not configured' — pyodbc not installed on sandbox
remaining_warnings.impact: Cosmetic only. Project display name falls back to 'Project ID: 7276'
remaining_warnings.fix: Install pyodbc + ODBC Driver 17 on sandbox VM, or set SQL_SERVER_HOST in .env

remaining_warnings.issue: Redis in-memory-only mode (not connected to external Redis)
remaining_warnings.impact: Cache works but not shared across workers. No persistence across restarts.

GET /api/scope-gap/projects/7276/drawing.note: Partial results due to upstream API timeouts during concurrent testing. Full set would include more disciplines.

GET /api/projects/7276/context.note: Returns empty trades/CSI — metadata fetch depends on SQL which is not configured

files_changed.change: Fixed set_ids param wrapping and tuple unpacking
Added per-trade fallback with asyncio.Semaphore(10) for drawings endpoint
Wired AsyncS3Ops into HighlightService instead of s3_ops=None
Replaced empty stub in fetch_project_metadata() with real trade probing
